meaning: n.[古] 连帽大氅 Joseph 约瑟夫(男子名)
examples: Joseph Smith was a voracious book collector.
Catlin sold the paintings to Philadelphia industrialist Joseph Harrison.
In what way did Joseph conclude the study?
"When most people think of chocolate being made, they think of Oompa Loompas, " said Theo founder Joseph Whinney.
Craig Allen Jameson and John Joseph Masotta own Parallax Associates, a growing architecture firm in Culver City, Calif.
